title: Objects, Scope, Linkage, Storage Duration, and Lifetime · Failure Case: Object Value Identity
summary: An embedded controller caches addresses across callbacks while automatic, static, thread, and allocated objects begin and end at different times. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem object value identity increment in object lifetime and address ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish an object, its value, representation bytes, address, declared type, and current lifetime.
Evaluate C23 _BitInt and implementation limits without assuming a novel width improves ABI portability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
